name: OutlineButton
description: Outline call-to-action button: a leading icon + bold label inside a transparent pill with an accent-coloured border. Border, icon and label all take action.primary, so a Ref style override recolours the whole set. References tokens only.
whenToUse: The standard outline CTA (e.g. Explore, Request callback). Components and templates COMPOSE this atom via a Ref, mapping `icon` + `label` to fields plus an `action`; override `style` for a non-default tone.
